verdicts.evidence: Security-critical bypass-resistant Bash allowlist guard (1106 insertions across 6 files) with adversarial tokenization and fail-closed envelope semantics warrants the opus/xhigh cell; clean done summary shows no struggle.
Small mechanical two-surface category addition (34 insertions, 3 files) plus a template re-point matches sonnet/medium, and the done summary reports clean completion.

Contract-touching ref/parse/brief plumbing across leaf modules (1056 insertions across 10 files) but mirroring existing incident-builder shapes fits sonnet at the top xhigh effort with no thrash signal in the record.

Re-fold-deterministic fingerprint fold, schema v113 bump, and sticky-latch event-sourcing invariants (1554 insertions across 10 files) are the epic's most correctness-subtle work, matching opus/xhigh.

Prose-only skill authoring cloned from the deconflict precedent plus sibling hardening (141 insertions, 5 files) requiring guard-allowlist cross-check fits sonnet/high with no novel design in the record.
Prune-first documentation and glossary edits in existing styles (28 insertions, 16 deletions, 4 files) against a lint gate matches sonnet/medium.
